ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., 3-1) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the match report */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match belongs to */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the match within the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  "assistant_referee_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth official */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (e.g., city, country) */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media links */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's kit */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team's kit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1995) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the season */,
  "current_round" INTEGER /* Current round of the season */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the season (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., Championship) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., goal, substitution, yellow card) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the match when the event occurred */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location on the field where the event occurred */,
  "additional_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event (e.g., offside, penalty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left, right) */,
  "kit_number" INTEGER /* Kit number of the player */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract ends */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Market value of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the player (for defenders and goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team in the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in the season */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded */,
  "shots_for" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the team */,
  "shots_against" INTEGER /* Number of shots faced by the team */,
  "corners_for" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the team */,
  "corners_against" INTEGER /* Number of corners faced by the team */,
  "possession_percentage" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Average pass accuracy */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "season_id", "league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player in the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the season */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for goalkeepers and defenders) */,
  "own_goals" INTEGER /* Number of own goals */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "dribbles_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of attempted dribbles */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won */,
  "tackles_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of tackles attempted */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside positions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id", "league_id")
)
